profile.name: Syamil Asyraf Bin Mohd Ali Jaafar
profile.headline: Student studying at Universiti Malaya building software and projects.
profile.summary: A confident, sociable, and creative computer science student with a jack-of-all-trades skillset and a strong passion for acquiring new information. I constantly strive to learn new programming skills, and get ideas from different areas of life and the world. I lead by example, collaborate well with others, and willingly step outside my comfort zone to contribute to the progress of the team, the project, and the overall vision.

stats.label: Bachelor of Computer Science, Universiti Malaya
